prompt_text:
### Demographics: 58-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 13 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
Heart failure: HFmrEF (NYHA Class II)
ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease
MASH
Body mass index category: Overweight
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Major Depressive Disorder
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF: HFmrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease; MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (father)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 76.1 kg; Height 176.6 cm; BMI 24.4 kg/m²; Blood pressure 127/74 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.5%; 9 months ago 9.0%; 6 months ago 8.5%; 3 months ago 8.0%; current 8.0%), FPG (12 months ago 203mg/dL; 9 months ago 208mg/dL; 6 months ago 190mg/dL; 3 months ago 198mg/dL; current 184mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 78.1kg; 9 months ago 79.1kg; 6 months ago 74.8kg; 3 months ago 76.1kg; current 76.1kg), Height (12 months ago 176.6cm; 9 months ago 176.6cm; 6 months ago 176.6cm; 3 months ago 176.6cm; current 176.6cm), BMI (12 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 24.0kg/m²; current 24.4kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 130mmHg; 9 months ago 130mmHg; 6 months ago 129mmHg; 3 months ago 129mmHg; current 127mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 76mmHg; 9 months ago 74mmHg; 6 months ago 76mmHg; 3 months ago 74mmHg; current 74mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 81U/L; 9 months ago 73U/L; 6 months ago 77U/L; 3 months ago 71U/L; current 77U/L), AST (12 months ago 70U/L; 9 months ago 67U/L; 6 months ago 61U/L; 3 months ago 66U/L; current 65U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.2mg/dL; current 1.2mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 56mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 58mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 56mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 57mL/min/1.73m²; current 54mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 178mg/g; 9 months ago 274mg/g; 6 months ago 203mg/g; 3 months ago 298mg/g; current 278mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 90mg/dL; 9 months ago 87mg/dL; 6 months ago 95mg/dL; 3 months ago 94mg/dL; current 91mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 35mg/dL; 9 months ago 38mg/dL; 6 months ago 37mg/dL; 3 months ago 34mg/dL; current 36mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 124mg/dL; 9 months ago 142mg/dL; 6 months ago 124mg/dL; 3 months ago 142mg/dL; current 131mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.8g/dL; 6 months ago 14.0g/dL; 3 months ago 14.0g/dL; current 13.2g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
